chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1815 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7828/2023 (Stay App) 3. For hearing of main case 28.12.2023 Mr. Safdar Ali Bhatti, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Kareem Bux Janwri, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Asadullah Jan, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5. With consent, this petition is disposed of in the terms whereby respondent No.2 is directed to decide the case of petitioner for renewal of license, if pending, within a period of one month under intimation to this Court. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
